title: ecbolium carthaginense
intro: Ecbolium carthaginense, also known as Carthage's ecbolium or Egyptian bugloss, is a plant species within the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ecbolium carthaginense include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties.
